text.title: Azure DevOps Boards Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on three observables (ecosystem, regulatory profile, team size) to apply ADO Boards, pick a lighter alternative, or skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: apply ADO Boards with CMMI template
use Linear or GitHub Projects v2 — lighter
apply ADO Boards with Agile or Scrum template
pick the native tool (GitHub Projects v2 or Jira) instead of ADO Boards

text.example: ecosystem=Microsoft → regulatory_profile=null → team_size=35 (not engineering-only) → apply ADO Boards Agile (rule template-inheritance).
